# The Country School — Fahad Campus, Bahawalpur

> A project of Bloomfield Hall offering quality English-medium education from Reception (Playgroup) to Class 8 in Model Town, Bahawalpur, Pakistan, with an affordable fee structure.

The Country School Fahad Campus is a leading school in Bahawalpur, Pakistan, providing primary and middle school education modelled on Bloomfield Hall standards. Contact: 0322-6107000 / 0305-7457171. Address: 41-A, Street #2, Near Telenor Franchise, Model Town-B, Bahawalpur.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the school, programs, gallery, announcements, and contact.
- [About Us](/about): School history, vision, mission, director's message, facilities, and location.
- [Curriculum](/curriculum): Academic approach, programs by level (Reception to Class 8), and extracurricular activities.
- [FAQ](/faq): Common questions about admissions, fees, curriculum, transport, and policies.
- [Admission Inquiry](/admission-query): Online form to submit an admission application.

- [Best School in Bahawalpur](/blog/best-school-in-bahawalpur): Why The Country School stands out among Bahawalpur schools.

- [School Admissions Open 2026](/blog/school-admissions-bahawalpur-2026): Admission process and required documents.
- [Bloomfield Hall Project in Bahawalpur](/blog/bloomfield-hall-project-bahawalpur): Our affiliation with Bloomfield Hall.

- [Top English Medium School in Bahawalpur](/blog/english-medium-school-bahawalpur): English-medium curriculum from Playgroup onward.
- [Best School in Model Town Bahawalpur](/blog/school-model-town-bahawalpur): Campus location and accessibility.
- [Importance of Quality Education in Bahawalpur](/blog/importance-of-education-bahawalpur): Our educational philosophy.
- [Blog Index](/blog): All articles.
